Package index

Reading in Papers

report_app()
Launch Report App
metacheck_app()
Launch Demo App
convert()
Convert documents
convert_bibr()
Convert documents using bibr
convert_grobid()
Convert a PDF to Grobid XML
grobid_to_bibr()
Convert Grobid TEI XML file to bibr format
read()
Read in grobid XML or bibr JSON
demopaper()
Get demo paper
demofile()
Get a demo file
psychsci
Psychological Science Open Access Paper Set
test_paper()
Test paper
paper_id()
Get Paper IDs
paper_write()
Write paper
paper_validate()
Validate a Paper Object

Search Papers

text_search() search_text()
Search text
text_expand() expand_text()
Expand text
paper_table()
Paper tables
ref_table()
Reference and DOI table

Module Functions

module_list()
List modules
module_help()
Get Module Help
module_info()
Get module information
module_run()
Run a module
module_report()
Report from module output
module_template()
Create a Module from a Template
report()
Create a Report
report_module_run()
Run modules for a report
report_qmd()
Create Report from Module Output

Module Helpers

These functions help module writers make consistently formatted report text.

scroll_table()
Make Scroll Table
report_table()
Display a Table in a Report
collapse_section()
Make Collapsible Section
plural()
Pluralise
link()
Make an html link
logger()
Log messages
lastlog()
Get the last log
format_ref()
Format Reference
get_prev_outputs()
Get Previous Outputs
format_bib_authors()
Format Bib Authors
fig_image_view()
View a figure image

Code Check Helpers

These functions help repo_check and code_check modules to assess code files.

code_abs_path()
Return Absolute Paths
code_extract_r()
Convert Rmd/qmd files to R code only
code_file_refs()
Get files referenced in code
code_lang()
Detect Code Language
code_library_lines()
Get Code Library Lines
code_line_stats()
Get Code Composition Stats
code_parse_r()
Parse code to check for errors
code_read()
Read code from files
code_remove_comments()
Remove comments from code text

LLM Functions

llm()
Query an LLM
llm_max_calls()
Set the maximum number of calls to the LLM
llm_model()
Set the default LLM model
llm_model_list()
List LLM Models
llm_use()
Set or get metacheck LLM use
json_expand()
Expand a JSON column

References/Citations

add_bib_match()
Match table from bib table
crossref_doi()
CrossRef Info from DOI
crossref_query()
Look up Reference in CrossRef
datacite_doi()
Doi.org Info from DataCite
doi_clean()
Clean DOIs
doi_lookup()
Doi.org Info from DOI
doi_valid_format()
Validate DOI format
doi_resolves()
Check whether a DOI resolves
FLoRA()
FORRT Replication Database (FLoRA)
FLoRA_update()
Update FLoRA
FLoRA_date()
Get date FLoRA was updated
openalex_doi()
OpenAlex info from DOI
openalex_query()
Look up a reference in OpenAlex
pubpeer_comments()
Get Pubpeer Comments
retractionwatch() rw()
RetractionWatch data
rw_date()
Get date retractionwatch was updated
rw_update()
Update retractionwatch

OSF Functions

osf_links()
Find OSF Links in Papers
osf_info()
Retrieve info from the OSF by ID
osf_file_download()
Download all OSF Project Files
osf_api_check()
Check OSF API Server Status
osf_check_id()
Check OSF IDs
osf_delay()
Set the OSF delay
osf_get_all_pages()
Get All OSF API Query Pages
osf_preprint_list()
Get A list of preprints from the OSF
osf_type()
Get OSF GUID Type

GitHub Functions

github_links()
Find GitHub Links in Papers
github_repo()
Get Short GitHub Repo Name
github_info()
Get GitHub Repo Info
github_files()
Get File List from GitHub
github_readme()
Get README from GitHub
github_languages()
Get Languages from GitHub Repo

Archive Functions

local_files()
List Local Files
aspredicted_links()
Find AsPredicted Links in Papers
aspredicted_info()
Retrieve info from AsPredicted by URL
rbox_links()
Find ResearchBox Links in Papers
rbox_info()
Retrieve info from ResearchBox by URL
rbox_file_download()
Retrieve files from ResearchBox by URL
zenodo_links()
Find Zenodo Links in Papers
zenodo_info()
Retrieve info from Zenodo by URL
zenodo_file_download()
Download all Zenodo Project Files

Integrations

email()
Set or get email
filetype()
Get file Type from Extension
file_category()
Categorise files
causal_relations()
Extract causal relations from sentence(s) via a Hugging Face Space

Validation Functions

validate()
Validate
accuracy()
Accuracy

Extras

extract_eq()
Extract P-Values
extract_p_values()
Extract P-Values
extract_urls()
Extract URLs
path_sanitize()
Sanitize File Path
stats()
Check Stats
emojis
Emojis

Internal functions

Functions for developers

check_orcid()
Check validity of ORCiD
credit_roles()
CRediT Roles
.aspredicted_info()
Retrieve and process info from AsPredicted by URL
.batch_query()
Batch query
.bibr_isalive()
Check bibr server status
.bibtype_convert()
Convert crossref/doi types to bibtex types
.coerce_bib_authors()
Coerce bib authors column to list of data frames
.crossref_parse_item()
Parse a CrossRef item into a data frame row
.crossref_query_parse()
Parse crossref query items into a table
.github_config()
GitHub Configuration
.grobid_isalive()
Check grobid server status
.grobid_to_bibr()
Convert grobid to Bibr format
.is_paper()
Detect a paper object
.is_paper_list()
Detect a list of paper objects
.llm_model_list_groq()
Get Groq Models
.llm_ollama_native()
Call ollama native API with think support
.openalex_add_abstract()
Add abstract from inverted index
.osf_file_data()
Structure OSF File Data
.osf_headers()
OSF Headers
.osf_info()
Retrieve info from the OSF by ID
.osf_node_data()
Structure OSF Node Data
.osf_parent_project()
Get OSF Parent Project
.osf_parse_response()
Parse an OSF API response into a data frame
.osf_pat_validate()
OSF PAT Validation
.osf_preprint_data()
Structure OSF Preprint Data
.osf_reg_data()
Structure OSF Registration Data
.osf_user_data()
Structure OSF User Data
.paper_coerce()
Coerce paper object types
.paper_schema()
Get paper schema
.parse_author_string()
Parse a legacy author string into a data frame
.process_full_text()
Process full text table
.rbox_info()
Retrieve info from ResearchBox by URL
.read_bibr()
Read bibr JSON file
.tei_authors()
Get authors from TEI type XML
.tei_bib()
Get bibliography from TEI type XML
.tei_text()
Get full text from TEI type XML
.tei_url()
Get URLs from text table
.tei_xrefs()
Get cross references from text table
.unnest_result()
Convert structured LLM result to a data frame
.xml2bib()
Parse XML bib format to bibtex
.xml_find1_text()
Find and return first text from XML by xpath
.xml_find_text()
Find and return text from XML by xpath
.xml_read_grobid()
Read in a grobid XML file
.zenodo_id()
Get zenodo ID from URL
.zenodo_info()
Retrieve info from Zenodo by ID
file_types
File Types
get_orcid()
Get ORCiD from Name
logpath()
Get log path
message()
Less scary green messages
module_find()
Find a module by name or path
online()
Check if the host of a URL is online
`%||%`
Default value for NULL
orcid_person()
Get Person Details for ORCiD
paper()
Create a paper object
paperlist()
Create a paperlist object
pb()
Progress Bar
print(<metacheck_module_help>)
Print Module Help Object
print(<metacheck_module_list>)
Print Module List Object
print(<metacheck_module_output>)
Print Module Output
print(<scivrs_paper>)
Print Paper Object
print(<scivrs_paperlist>)
Print PaperList Object
rep_if()
Replace If
`[`(<scivrs_paperlist>)
Subset PaperList Object
verbose()
Set or get verbosity
